title: oeosporangium × malacitense
side_effects: Oeosporangium × malacitense can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and skin irritation. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can lead to stomach cramps, diarrhea, and vomiting, while prolonged skin contact may cause rashes, redness, and itching. Furthermore, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts has been linked to increased heart rate, blood pressure, and respiratory problems in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of Oeosporangium × malacitense can even cause anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention.
